chunks.text: 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Appl. No.S-269 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE. For hearing of post-arrest bail. 17.07.2025 None present for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General. *************** Learned Deputy Prosecutor General has pointed out that after full dressed trial the applicant/accused namely, Akber Ali has been acquitted u/s 249-A Cr.P.C, by the trial Court in the subject crime. He, therefore, submits that instant bail application has become infructuous hence, seeks its disposal. In support of his contentions, he placed on record a copy of CFM which affirms his contentions. In view of above, this Crl. bail application has served its purpose which stands disposed of having become infructuous. J U D G E Ihsan/PS.
